title: User enters a non-existent supplier code, bot recovers with search
user_persona: Buyer who mistyped or misremembered a supplier code

conversation.user: Create a PO for supplier XYZ-NONEXISTENT, USD, today.

bot_must: attempt supplier validation (uses POCRTMAINSUPPUI or POCRTMAINHLPSUP for help)
offer to search by partial name / show valid suppliers
NOT proceed to next slot until valid supplier captured

conversation.user: Search for suppliers with 'XYZ' in the name.

bot_must: invoke the supplier help/search task with partial match 'XYZ'
validate XYZ-CORP-001 exists and is active
continue header slot collection (still need buyer, numbering_series, lines)

evaluation_metrics.validation_failure_detected: bot detects supplier not found at turn 1
evaluation_metrics.no_premature_progression: bot does not move past supplier slot until valid
evaluation_metrics.graceful_recovery: bot offers help/search, not just error message
